SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.costestimation

Class MaterialTakeOffItem

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.costestimation.MaterialTakeOffItem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MaterialTakeOffItem extends Object implements Serializable
A material take-off line item used in detailed NeqSim cost estimates.

Each item records the quantity basis, material, weight, cost, and source used for a cost estimate. It is intentionally generic so vessel shells, piping, internals, structures, wells, and package equipment can share the same report contract.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Constructor Details

    • MaterialTakeOffItem

      public MaterialTakeOffItem(String item, String category, String material, double quantity, String unit, double weightKg, double costUSD, String source)
      Creates a material take-off item.
      Parameters:
      item - item label
      category - category label such as vessel, piping, electrical, structural, or package
      material - material label
      quantity - quantity value
      unit - quantity unit
      weightKg - item weight in kg, or Double.NaN when not weight-based
      costUSD - estimated cost in USD
      source - source identifier for the quantity or cost
